content.full_text:
Office
of
Education

Madera County Superintendent of Schools
28125 Avenue 14, Madera, California 93638 (209) 673-0051

APR 1 1990

Sally L. Frazier, Superintendent

April 10, 1990

Mr. John Rothman
California Fair Political
Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Mr. Rothman:

You and I have spoken a couple of times regarding the requirement for
attorneys to complete Form 730. You indicated that you have also
received several phone calls from various law firms regarding this
issue.

I am forwarding a copy of the memo which I received from Chinello,
Chinello, Shelton & Auchard. Since I do not have the information they
are requesting, please respond to paragraph 2 of their memo. I would
also appreciate copies of your response.

Your assistance regarding this matter is greatly appreciated. Please
contact me if you have any questions or concerns at (209) 673-6051 ext.
222.

Sincerely,

Cheryl A. Lara
Administrative Assistant, Business Services
and Self-Insured Programs

Enclosure

CHINELLO, CHINELLO, SHELTON & AUCHARD
AN ASSOCIATION OF LAW CORPORATIONS
ATTORNEYS AT LAW
3451 WEST SHAW AVENUE
P.O. BOX 3219
FRESNO, CALIFORNIA 90794-3219
TELEPHONE (209) 276-9400
FAX (209) 276-2905

CHINELLO PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION

JOHN D. CHINELLO, SR. (1896-1985)
JOHN D. CHINELLO, JR.
PAUL AUCHARD
ANDREW B. JONES
DANIEL I. ALLER, III
MALCOLM H. STEWART
MARGARET KEMP-WILLIAMS *
JOHN K. ORMOND IV
JOSEPH D. COOPER

* ALSO MEMBER OF WISCONSIN BAR

JOHN M. SHELTON, INC.
A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION

JOHN M. SHELTON
RICHARD C. STRONG

March 13, 1990

Madera County Superintendent of Schools
28123 Avenue 14
Madera, California 93638

Attention: Ms. Cheryl Lara

Re: Form 730 - Statement of Economic Interests
     for Designated Employees

Dear Ms. Lara:

     You have recently forwarded to us a Form 730 - Statement
of Economic Interests for Designated Employees and have requested
that we fill that out.

     Since we are an independent law firm not employed by Madera
County Superintendent of Schools we question whether this form
is applicable to us. In any event, we would appreciate any
information you might have, including specifically the code
sections involved and any written opinions by the Attorney General
or others concerning the applicability of these forms to
independent law firms.

     Your cooperation in this matter is greatly appreciated.

                                   Very truly yours,

                                   [signature]
                                   Paul Auchard
                                   CHINELLO, CHINELLO, SHELTON & AUCHARD

PA/lv
